task_completion.description: Verify the container is created from the 'nginx:alpine' image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command containing 'nginx:alpine' (e.g., docker run ... nginx:alpine) or the image name 'nginx:alpine' listed next to the container in a Docker GUI.
Look for '--name my-nginx-server' in the terminal command, or the name 'my-nginx-server' explicitly shown in the container list of a Docker GUI or 'docker ps' output.

task_completion.description: Verify host port 8888 is mapped to container port 80.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '-p 8888:80' in the terminal command, or '8888->80/tcp' (or similar port mapping notation) in 'docker ps' output or a Docker GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify the container is in a running state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status of 'Up' in 'docker ps' terminal output, or a green 'Running' indicator/status next to the container in a Docker GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that http://localhost:8888 returns a response.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser navigated to 'http://localhost:8888' showing the 'Welcome to nginx!' page, or a terminal showing the HTML response from a command like 'curl http://localhost:8888'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with an actual terminal or Docker GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that Docker commands were run in a real terminal emulator or actions were taken in a legitimate Docker desktop application, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the web response is genuinely from the local server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the browser address bar explicitly shows 'http://localhost:8888' or '127.0.0.1:8888' (not a local file path like 'file://...'), or that a real HTTP client like curl/wget was used.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the success output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent didn't simply use 'echo' or 'print' commands to output fake 'docker ps' results or fake HTML responses to the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected container name: 'my-nginx-server'. Expected image: 'nginx:alpine'. Expected host port: 8888. Expected container port: 80.
